name: consult
description: Get multiple AI perspectives on any question through a structured multi-model debate with moderator synthesis

arguments.name: question
arguments.desc: The question or topic to discuss

name: review_code
description: Get a multi-perspective code review from multiple AI models with synthesized feedback

name: debug
description: Debug an issue using multiple AI models to analyze the problem from different angles

arguments.name: issue
arguments.desc: The bug or issue to debug

name: architect
description: Get architectural recommendations from multiple AI models for system design decisions

arguments.name: requirements
arguments.desc: The system requirements or architectural question

name: plan_implementation
description: Create an implementation plan using multi-model consensus on approach and steps

arguments.name: task
arguments.desc: The feature or task to plan implementation for

name: assess_tradeoffs
description: Evaluate tradeoffs of technical decisions using multiple AI perspectives

arguments.name: decision
arguments.desc: The technical decision or tradeoff to assess
